meta.title: Everything you need to know about America's next STEALTH FIGHTER
meta.description:
The U.S. Air Force's Next Generation Air Dominance (NGAD) program aims to field the world's first 6th-generation fighter to replace the still-dominant F-22 Raptor by the close of this decade. 

Here's a 5-minute crash course into where this program came from and what it intends to accomplish — from the fighter itself, to the AI-Enabled drone wingmen meant to fly alongside it.
